Apple Black rot.cause: Fungal disease caused by Botryosphaeria obtusa.
Apple Black rot.symptoms: Brown leaf spots with purple borders and rotting fruit.
Apple Black rot.treatment: Remove infected leaves and consult an agricultural officer before applying fungicide.
Apple Black rot.prevention: Prune trees properly and maintain orchard hygiene.
Apple Black rot.disclaimer: This is general guidance only. Consult an agricultural expert before treatment.

Apple healthy.disclaimer: AI result should be verified if symptoms appear later.

Corn Common rust.cause: Fungal disease caused by Puccinia sorghi.
Corn Common rust.treatment: Remove infected leaves and consult an expert before using fungicide.
Corn Common rust.prevention: Use resistant varieties and rotate crops.
Corn Common rust.disclaimer: Consult an agricultural expert before treatment.

Corn Northern Leaf Blight.cause: Fungal disease caused by Exserohilum turcicum.
Corn Northern Leaf Blight.treatment: Remove infected leaves and consult an expert.
Corn Northern Leaf Blight.prevention: Use resistant varieties and crop rotation.
Corn Northern Leaf Blight.disclaimer: Consult an agricultural expert before treatment.

Potato Early blight.cause: Fungal disease caused by Alternaria solani.
Potato Early blight.symptoms: Brown circular spots with concentric rings.
Potato Early blight.treatment: Remove infected leaves and consult an officer before applying fungicide.
Potato Early blight.prevention: Rotate crops and maintain field hygiene.
Potato Early blight.disclaimer: Consult an agricultural expert before treatment.

Potato Late blight.cause: Fungal-like disease caused by Phytophthora infestans.
Potato Late blight.symptoms: Dark brown spots on leaves and stems.
Potato Late blight.treatment: Remove infected leaves and consult an officer before applying fungicide.
Potato Late blight.prevention: Avoid excess moisture and improve air circulation.
Potato Late blight.disclaimer: Consult an agricultural expert before treatment.

Potato healthy.disclaimer: AI result should be verified if symptoms appear later.

Tomato Early blight.cause: Fungal disease caused by Alternaria solani.
Tomato Early blight.symptoms: Brown spots with concentric rings on lower leaves.
Tomato Early blight.treatment: Remove infected leaves and consult an expert before applying fungicide.
Tomato Early blight.prevention: Avoid overhead irrigation and rotate crops.
Tomato Early blight.disclaimer: Consult an agricultural expert before treatment.

Tomato Late blight.cause: Fungal-like disease caused by Phytophthora infestans.
Tomato Late blight.symptoms: Large dark lesions on leaves and stems.
Tomato Late blight.treatment: Remove infected leaves and consult an expert before applying fungicide.
Tomato Late blight.prevention: Improve spacing and avoid wet foliage.
